description: Bridge to Zen Browser's internal workspace APIs and palette UI

functions.name: getActiveWorkspaceId
functions.description: Get the UUID of the currently active workspace

functions.name: getTabWorkspaceId
functions.description: Get the workspace UUID for a given extension tab ID

functions.name: switchTo
functions.description: Switch to a workspace by UUID

functions.name: activateTabByDomId
functions.description: Activate a tab by its DOM id, switching workspaces if needed

functions.name: goToPreviousTab
functions.description: Go to the previously activated tab (cross-workspace)

functions.name: goToParentTab
functions.description: Go to the opener tab, switching workspaces if needed

functions.name: closeTabByDomId
functions.description: Close a tab by its DOM id. Refuses to close pinned tabs.

functions.name: getAllTabs
functions.description: Get all tabs across all workspaces via DOM query

functions.name: getCompanionMods
functions.description: Get all companion mods with install status

functions.name: installCompanionMod
functions.description: Install a companion Zen Mod by ID

functions.name: removeCompanionMod
functions.description: Remove a companion Zen Mod by ID

functions.name: getSelectedTabDomIds
functions.description: Get DOM IDs of multiselected tabs (excludes essentials)

functions.name: getWorkspacesWithIcons
functions.description: Get all workspaces with inline SVG icon content

functions.name: moveSelectedTabsToWorkspace
functions.description: Move selected tabs to a workspace, placed at top position

functions.name: showPalette
functions.description: Toggle the command palette overlay. Returns true if opened, false if closed.
